name: LazySkills
description: Portable agent skills by Lachlan Chen for AgInTiFlow, Codex, Claude, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, and compatible local-tool agents.

skills.description: Prepare, generate, monitor, download, and publish LALACHAN Xiaoyunque videos through the logged-in browser UI with evidence checks.
Publish LazyEdit and LALACHAN/RARACHAN videos through LazyEdit, AutoPubMonitor, AutoPublish, and platform queues.
Prepare, publish, and verify npm packages, including token-safe local auth, 2FA, trusted publishing, provenance, and install smoke tests.
Publish a local git repository to GitHub from Codex or AgInTi, including README/resource checks, safe commit discipline, remote creation, push, homepage, description, and topics.
Transcribe audio or video into timestamped Markdown with optional WhisperX diarization, then produce neutral Markdown, LaTeX, and PDF reports without leaking private source context.

Replace or cover one or more detected video faces with supplied or generated image assets, including multi-person animal masks with stable identity tracking, keyed-background removal, alpha compositing, and audio-preserving output.
Transcribe a video, derive topic-based section boundaries from the transcript, and split a source or edited video into named clips with a manifest.
Correct scanned/OCR books into page-aware Markdown, booklike TeX, and validated PDFs while preserving figures, captions, and TOC structure.
Build LinguaLeaf/PocketPolyglot multilingual interlinear books with JSON chunks, ruby/pinyin/furigana, grammar roles, and bidirectional PDFs.
Coordinate multiple agent sessions across machines, repos, tools, and runtimes using safe handoff packets, peer identity maps, private session mirrors, status probes, and action contracts.
